title: Milkdown plugin for handling raw HTML details and summary elements
purpose: Provides a Milkdown plugin to parse and render HTML details and summary elements as custom markdown nodes, supporting nested details and graceful degradation for unmatched tags.
module_context: Exports a remark plugin for processing HTML details tags, a node schema definition for details nodes, and a React component for rendering details views.

steps.content: Test if the attributes string contains an 'open' attribute in any case variant.
Return true if the open attribute is present, false otherwise.
Iterate through each child node in the children array.
If the node is not an HTML node, recursively process its children if they exist.
If the node is an HTML node, check if it matches the opening details tag pattern.
Extract the attributes from the opening tag and determine if it's open.
Search for the matching closing tag while tracking nesting depth.
If no matching closing tag is found, leave the HTML nodes untouched.
Extract the summary text from either the opening tag or the following HTML sibling.
Recursively process the body children to handle nested details.
Replace the range of HTML nodes with a synthetic details node.
Return a unified plugin function that processes the root tree.
Apply the processChildren function to transform HTML details tags in the tree.
Define a node schema for the details element with block group and defining properties.
Set default attributes for open state and summary text.
Configure parsing from DOM elements with specific tag and attribute handling.
Configure rendering to DOM with appropriate attributes and structure.
Define parsing from markdown format with runner to handle details nodes.
Define rendering to markdown format with appropriate HTML opener and closer.
Access the node and content reference from the node view context.
Extract the open state and summary text from the node attributes.
Render a details element with the appropriate open state and data attributes.
Render a summary element with editable disabled and the summary text.
Render a div element with the content reference for nested content.
